assertions.name: explores_before_asking
assertions.text: Claude reads package.json and source files before asking any question

assertions.name: presents_known_list
assertions.text: Claude presents a KNOWN list of 3-5 things it inferred from the codebase

assertions.name: identifies_stack_correctly
assertions.text: Claude correctly identifies Next.js, Supabase, TypeScript, and Vitest

assertions.name: starts_with_product
assertions.text: First question is about the product/what the project does, not about technical setup

assertions.name: question_has_options
assertions.text: Questions include concrete options (not open-ended) and a recommendation

assertions.name: one_question_at_a_time
assertions.text: Claude asks exactly one question per message, not multiple

assertions.name: does_not_infer_conventions
assertions.text: Claude does NOT decide naming conventions, import ordering, or code style on its own — signals it will ask about preferences

assertions.name: asks_deep_questions
assertions.text: Questions go beyond surface level — asks about edge cases or specific patterns, not just 'which framework'
